bias_defense_notes: Correct answer positions spread across all four slots (0,1,2,3). Position 2 used twice (2/5 = 0.40, at constraint ceiling). Positions 0, 1, 3 each used once. max_share constraint satisfied.

questions.objective_ref: State the first question of the Judgment Framework and explain what it is asking.
Define the three dimensions of error cost: severity, probability, and detectability.
Apply the three-dimension cost analysis to at least two real-world scenarios involving AI-assisted decisions.
Distinguish between low-cost and high-cost errors and explain why the distinction changes how much scrutiny an AI output deserves.
Name the other two Judgment Framework questions and explain why Q1 must come first.
